definitions.text: A body of words, and set of methods of combining them (called a grammar), understood by a community and used as a form of communication.
examples: The English and German languages are both members of the West Germanic language family.
Deaf and mute people communicate using sign language.

definitions.text: The ability to communicate using words.
To communicate by language; to express in language.
An admonishment said in response to someone using vulgar language during a conversation.
A languet, a flat plate in or below the flue pipe of an organ.
